testcase.name: test_valid_api_version_1
testcase.failure:
self = <tests.test_api_version.TestAPIVersion testMethod=test_valid_api_version_1>
def test_valid_api_version_1(self): > hn = HackerNews() ^^^^^^^^^^^^
tests/test_api_version.py:19: _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _
self = <hackernews.HackerNews object at 0x1071b2350>, version = 'v0'
def __init__(self, version='v0'): """
Args: version (string): specifies Hacker News API version. Default is `v0`.
Raises: InvalidAPIVersion: If Hacker News version is not supported.
""" try: self.base_url = supported_api_versions[version] except KeyError: raise InvalidAPIVersion self.item_url = urljoin(self.base_url, 'item/') self.user_url = urljoin(self.base_url, 'user/') > self.session = requests.Session() ^^^^^^^^ E NameError: name 'requests' is not defined
hackernews/__init__.py:71: NameError
